title: Global Betting Report
headline: Books wait on prices as the board takes shape, with moneylines, spreads, totals and late market movement giving bettors the first real read.
snapshot: Odds, implied probability, line movement, market context, and what bettors should monitor across the sports world.

homepage_cards.headline: Books wait on prices as the board takes shape, with moneylines, spreads, totals and late market movement giving bettors the first real read.
homepage_cards.snapshot: Moneylines, spreads, totals, board depth, and sportsbook pricing are being monitored for betting-market movement.
key_data: Market board is active across available leagues.
why_it_matters: Line movement matters most when it connects to injuries, weather, roster news, or sportsbook adjustment.
what_to_watch: Track favorites getting more expensive or underdogs drawing late money.
Compare sportsbook movement before treating one number as the full market.

homepage_cards.headline: What bettors should monitor today
homepage_cards.snapshot: Track line movement, injury news, starting lineup changes, pitching confirmations, weather, rest advantages, and late market steam before making any betting decision.
key_data: Betting context requires line movement plus supporting news.
why_it_matters: A number alone is not a recommendation. Context explains why the market may be moving.
what_to_watch: Injuries, pitching confirmations, weather, public money, and late sportsbook adjustment.
